Container.Name: codex-terminal
Container.Overview: SSH and browser-accessible Codex CLI environment for Codex Desktop Remote SSH and direct WebUI access. Unraid management is routed through the internal Unraid MCP sidecar.
Container.Requires: Create the Docker network first: docker network create codex-mgmt. Deploy unraid-mcp on the same network before connecting Codex.

Config.Name: SSH Port
Config.Description: Host port for SSH into the Codex container. Expose only on LAN, VPN, or Tailscale.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the browser terminal. Expose only on LAN, VPN, or Tailscale.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent Codex config, SSH host keys, authorized keys, cache, and workspace.

Config.Name: SSH Authorized Keys
Config.Description: One or more public SSH keys. Leave blank only if you intentionally enable password login.

Config.Name: Enable SSH Password Login
Config.Description: Default is false. If true, SSH Password must be set.

Config.Name: SSH Password
Config.Description: Plaintext password for the codex SSH user, used only when SSH_PASSWORD_LOGIN=true. Use a strong password and expose SSH only on LAN, VPN, or Tailscale.

Config.Name: SSH Password Hash
Config.Description: Optional pre-hashed password for advanced users. Leave empty when SSH Password is set.

Config.Name: Enable WebUI
Config.Description: Starts a ttyd browser terminal attached to a persistent tmux session.

Config.Name: Require WebUI Login
Config.Description: Default is true. Disable only behind another authenticated proxy or on an isolated network.

Config.Name: WebUI Username
Config.Description: Username for the WebUI basic-auth prompt.

Config.Name: WebUI Password
Config.Description: Password for the WebUI basic-auth prompt. Required when WEBUI_AUTH=true.

Config.Name: WebUI Max Clients
Config.Description: Maximum concurrent browser terminal clients.

Config.Name: WebUI Tmux Session
Config.Description: Name of the persistent tmux session used by the WebUI.

Config.Name: WebUI Log Level
Config.Description: ttyd log level. Default 1 keeps credentials out of startup logs; increase only while troubleshooting.

Config.Name: Auto Launch Codex
Config.Description: Automatically starts Codex CLI in the WebUI tmux session on container start.

Config.Name: WebUI Codex Bypass Approvals
Config.Description: Starts WebUI Codex with --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox. The container boundary remains the primary sandbox.

Config.Name: Update Codex On Start
Config.Description: Updates @openai/codex globally as root during container startup. Disable for fully deterministic image contents.

Config.Name: Codex NPM Version
Config.Description: npm version spec for @openai/codex used by startup updates. Use latest for automatic updates on restart.

Config.Name: Codex Update Timeout
Config.Description: Maximum seconds to wait for the startup Codex npm update before continuing with the bundled version.

Config.Name: Unraid MCP Bearer Token
Config.Description: Bearer token used by Codex to authenticate to the internal Unraid MCP sidecar. Must match the sidecar.
